scripts.build: electron-packager . Photopic --platform=darwin --overwrite --icon=icon.icns --asar --app-bundle-id=com.colmmckeon.photopic && node scripts/clean-privacy-keys.js Photopic-darwin-arm64/Photopic.app && codesign --force --deep --sign - Photopic-darwin-arm64/Photopic.app && rm -rf ../Photopic.app && cp -R Photopic-darwin-arm64/Photopic.app ../Photopic.app && echo 'App updated'
